title: A New Era: Péter Magyar Sworn In as Hungary’s Prime Minister
subtitle: After 16 years of Viktor Orbán’s leadership, Hungary begins a major political shift.

summary.en: Péter Magyar has officially become the prime minister of Hungary. His victory marks the end of Viktor Orbán’s 16-year rule. The new government plans to fight corruption and improve relations with the European Union. Thousands of supporters gathered in Budapest to celebrate the change. Magyar now faces the challenge of fixing the economy and restoring democratic systems.
summary.zh: 彼得·馬札爾已正式就任匈牙利總理。他的勝利標誌著奧班十六年統治的終結。新政府計畫打擊貪腐並改善與歐盟的關係。數千名支持者聚集在布達佩斯慶祝這一變革。馬札爾目前面臨修復經濟與恢復民主體制的挑戰。

paragraphs.en: Péter Magyar was sworn in as the new prime minister of Hungary on Saturday. This event marks a historic moment for the country, as it officially ends the 16-year rule of Viktor Orbán. Magyar, a leader from the centre-right Tisza party, won a landslide victory in the parliamentary elections held last month. The change in leadership has brought a sense of hope to many citizens who gathered outside the parliament building in Budapest to watch the ceremony on large screens.
paragraphs.zh: 彼得·馬札爾 (Péter Magyar) 於週六宣誓就任匈牙利新任總理。此事件對該國而言是一個歷史性時刻，正式終結了奧班 (Viktor Orbán) 長達十六年的統治。馬札爾是中間偏右政黨「提薩黨」(Tisza) 的領導人，在上個月舉行的國會大選中獲得壓倒性勝利。領導層的更迭為許多聚集在布達佩斯國會大廈外、透過大螢幕觀看就職典禮的公民帶來了希望。

paragraphs.en: According to The Guardian, the atmosphere in the capital was full of excitement. Thousands of supporters cheered as they watched the inaugural session. For many, this day represented a long-awaited change. Erzsébet Medve, a 68-year-old teacher who traveled from Miskolc to attend the event, said that for the first time in many years, she felt proud to be Hungarian. She noted that the previous government had neglected important areas like the education system, even when they had the money to support it.
paragraphs.zh: 根據《衛報》(The Guardian) 報導，首都的氣氛充滿興奮。數千名支持者在觀看就職會議時歡呼雀躍。對許多人來說，這一天代表著期待已久的改變。從米什科爾茨 (Miskolc) 前來參加活動的六十八歲教師艾瑟貝特·梅德韋 (Erzsébet Medve) 表示，這是多年來她第一次為身為匈牙利人感到驕傲。她指出，前政府即便有資金支持，卻忽視了教育體系等重要領域。

paragraphs.en: During his speech, Magyar told the crowd that the road to this moment had been long and difficult. He stated that the people of Hungary had given his party a clear mandate—a formal instruction from voters—to start a new chapter in the nation's history. He promised not only to change the government but to change the entire system. Magyar emphasized that his goal is to build a more inclusive and free Hungary, where everyone feels they have a place. He also declared that his government would seek justice against those who were involved in corruption during the previous administration.
paragraphs.zh: 馬札爾在演說中告訴群眾，通往這一刻的道路既漫長又艱辛。他表示，匈牙利人民已賦予他的政黨明確的授權——即選民給予的正式指令——以開啟國家歷史的新篇章。他承諾不僅要更換政府，還要改變整個體制。馬札爾強調，他的目標是建立一個更具包容性與自由的匈牙利，讓每個人都覺得自己有一席之地。他並宣稱，其政府將針對前政府執政期間涉及貪腐的人員追究法律責任。

paragraphs.en: Deutsche Welle reports that the Tisza party won 141 out of 199 seats in the April elections. This gives the new government a two-thirds majority, which is enough power to change the constitution and pass major reforms. One of the first symbolic actions of the new administration was the return of the European Union flag to the parliament building. The flag had been removed by the previous government in 2014, signaling a shift toward closer cooperation with the EU.
paragraphs.zh: 德國之聲 (Deutsche Welle) 報導，提薩黨在四月的選舉中贏得一百九十九個席次中的一百四十一席。這賦予新政府三分之二的多數優勢，足以修改憲法並通過重大改革。新政府的第一個象徵性行動，就是將歐盟旗幟重新掛回國會大廈。該旗幟曾於二〇一四年被前政府撤下，此舉象徵著匈牙利正轉向與歐盟進行更緊密的合作。

paragraphs.en: Magyar faces several urgent challenges as he begins his term. The Hungarian economy has struggled with stagnation—a period where growth is very slow or stops completely. Additionally, the country is currently feeling the pressure of rising energy costs caused by conflicts in the Middle East. One of the prime minister’s main tasks will be to unblock billions of euros in EU funding. This money was frozen during the Orbán era because the European Union was concerned about corruption and the rule of law in Hungary. By securing these funds, Magyar hopes to restart the economy.
paragraphs.zh: 馬札爾在任期開始時面臨幾項迫切挑戰。匈牙利經濟一直飽受停滯之苦，即成長極其緩慢或完全停止的時期。此外，該國目前正感受到中東衝突所引發的能源成本上漲壓力。總理的主要任務之一，將是解鎖數十億歐元的歐盟資金。這些資金在奧班執政時期遭到凍結，原因是歐盟對匈牙利的貪腐問題與法治狀況感到擔憂。馬札爾希望透過爭取這些資金，來重振經濟。

paragraphs.en: Foreign policy will also see significant changes. Under Orbán, Hungary had a strained relationship with the European Union and moved closer to Moscow. Magyar has promised to repair these ties. As a member of NATO, Hungary is expected to play a more active role in supporting the EU’s goals, including its stance on the war in Ukraine. The new prime minister has made it clear that he wants to move away from the populist and nationalist policies that defined the last 16 years.
paragraphs.zh: 外交政策也將出現重大轉變。在奧班領導下，匈牙利與歐盟的關係緊張，並與莫斯科走得更近。馬札爾已承諾修復這些關係。身為北大西洋公約組織 (NATO) 的成員，預期匈牙利將在支持歐盟目標方面發揮更積極的作用，包括對烏克蘭戰爭的立場。新任總理已明確表示，他希望擺脫過去十六年來定義該國的民粹主義與民族主義政策。

paragraphs.en: As Magyar begins his work, he has called for officials appointed during the Orbán era to resign by the end of the month. He specifically mentioned the president, Tamás Sulyok, who had nominated him to form the government. The public response to these calls has been largely supportive, with crowds cheering for his promises of accountability. While the path ahead is uncertain, the mood in Budapest suggests that many Hungarians are ready for a new direction. Whether Magyar can successfully rebuild the country's institutions and improve the lives of its citizens remains to be seen, but the official start of his government has certainly marked the end of a long and controversial chapter in Hungarian politics.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著馬札爾開始工作，他已要求奧班時期任命的官員在月底前辭職。他特別點名了提名他組閣的總統蘇尤克 (Tamás Sulyok)。公眾對這些呼籲的反應大多表示支持，群眾為他提出的問責承諾歡呼。儘管前路充滿不確定性，但布達佩斯的氛圍顯示，許多匈牙利人已準備好迎接新的方向。馬札爾能否成功重建國家體制並改善公民生活仍有待觀察，但其政府的正式啟動，無疑為匈牙利政治中漫長且具爭議的篇章劃下了句點。

keyTerms.definitionEn: An overwhelming victory in an election.
keyTerms.noteZh: 原指山崩，這裡用來形容選舉中獲得壓倒性的多數票。文中：Magyar, a leader from the centre-right Tisza party, won a landslide victory in the parliamentary elections held last month.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To allow something to move or happen again after it was stopped or restricted.
keyTerms.noteZh: 這裡指讓原本被凍結的資金重新可以使用。文中：One of the prime minister’s main tasks will be to unblock billions of euros in EU funding.

keyTerms.definitionEn: Not relaxed or friendly; showing signs of tension or difficulty.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見於描述肌肉拉傷，這裡用來形容國家間的關係緊張。文中：Under Orbán, Hungary had a strained relationship with the European Union and moved closer to Moscow.

sources.name: The Guardian World
sources.title: Péter Magyar sworn in as Hungary’s prime minister ending 16-year Orbán era

sources.name: Deutsche Welle (DW) Top
sources.title: Hungary: Peter Magyar sworn in as prime minister

quiz.question: What specific action did the new administration take to symbolize a change in its relationship with the European Union?

options.A: It officially joined the European Union as a new member.
options.B: It requested more funding to repair the education system.
options.C: It re-installed the European Union flag at the parliament building.
options.D: It announced that it would stop using the national currency.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據文章第四段，新政府上任後的第一個象徵性行動，就是將歐盟旗幟重新掛回國會大廈，該旗幟曾於 2014 年被前政府移除，此舉象徵著與歐盟關係的改善。選項 A 錯誤，因為匈牙利早已是歐盟成員；選項 B 雖然提到教育與資金，但與歐盟旗幟的象徵意義無關；選項 D 在文中未提及。

quiz.question: Based on the text, why is the Hungarian government's relationship with the EU currently complicated?

options.A: Because the EU refuses to allow Hungary to participate in NATO.
options.B: Because of previous concerns regarding corruption and the rule of law.
options.C: Because Hungary has decided to completely stop trading with European countries.
options.D: Because the EU wants to replace the Hungarian prime minister with a new leader.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據第五段，歐盟先前凍結了對匈牙利的資金，原因正是對匈牙利當時的貪腐問題以及法治狀況感到憂慮。選項 A 錯誤，因為匈牙利是 NATO 成員且文中未提及歐盟禁止其參與；選項 C 錯誤，因為文章提到新政府正致力於修復與歐盟的關係，而非斷絕貿易；選項 D 錯誤，文中並未提及歐盟干預匈牙利總理的人選。

quiz.question: In the fifth paragraph, what does the word 'stagnation' mean in the context of the Hungarian economy?

options.A: A period of rapid and uncontrolled financial growth.
options.B: A state where economic activity is barely moving or not growing at all.
options.C: A sudden increase in the cost of energy and basic goods.
options.D: A system where the government controls all private businesses.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。文中提到經濟面臨 stagnation，並在後面的括號解釋為「成長非常緩慢或完全停止的時期」。這與選項 B 的定義相符。選項 A 是相反的意思；選項 C 雖然文中提到能源成本上升，但這不是 stagnation 的定義；選項 D 與經濟停滯的定義無關。

quiz.question: What is the central message of this article regarding the political situation in Hungary?

options.A: The new government is expected to continue the exact policies of the previous administration.
options.B: The Hungarian people are largely unhappy with the recent election results.
options.C: The country is undergoing a significant political transition aimed at reform and international realignment.
options.D: The main goal of the new prime minister is to focus solely on the education system.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。全文主要描述 Péter Magyar 上任後，匈牙利在政治體制、外交政策（如修復與歐盟關係）以及對貪腐的處理上，都展現出與過去 16 年截然不同的改革方向。選項 A 錯誤，因為改革正是為了改變現狀；選項 B 與文中提到的群眾歡呼與希望感相矛盾；選項 D 過於狹隘，教育只是其中一小部分，並非政府的唯一目標。
